prompt: Build a community page for Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Community home route
nodes.details: Add React route + page shell for /community backed by postgres-backed feed query with empty-result contract.

nodes.label: Members + posts APIs
nodes.details: Ship members/posts endpoints now; keep entitlements stubbed until paid-vs-free decision lands.

nodes.label: Authz for profiles
nodes.details: Smallest shippable slice: member profiles + authz boundaries on react/postgres/node stack.

nodes.label: Activity visibility model
nodes.details: Data model must encode public/private activity scopes before feed queries ship — trust blocker.

nodes.label: Quiet notification hook
nodes.details: Must support empty/quiet reply acknowledgment as acceptance constraint; no engagement-spam defaults.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Paywall out of scope
nodes.details: Do not implement entitlements enforcement in this slice — founding promise prioritizes access for v1.
